task_description: Define a function named count_positive that returns the number of positive integers in values.
Define a function named filter_by_prefix that returns a new list containing strings that start with prefix.
Define a function named count_word_occurrences that returns a dictionary mapping each word in words to the number of times it occurs.
Define a function named first_divisible that returns the first integer in values that is divisible by divisor. Return None if no such integer exists.
Define a function named sum_even that returns the sum of the even integers in values.
Define a function named deduplicate_preserving_order that returns items with duplicates removed while preserving the first occurrence of each item.
Define a function named group_by_first_letter that returns a dictionary mapping first letters to the words that start with that letter.
Define a function named clamp_values that returns a new list where each integer in values is limited to the inclusive range from minimum to maximum.
